Bound-controller child root slot projection should spend the same source-expression lifecycle helper as ordinary runtime bindings before overlays read the child slot type. Do not let overlay aliases compensate for a bound-controller-specific AstBindThenEvaluate/AstEvaluateOnly branch.

Bound-controller child root aliases should use the scope-materialized slot type even when the parent-bound value is structural. If the type needs an importable generated spelling, fix generated-type-expression.ts instead of falling back to the child bindable initializer or suppressing overlay arity diagnostics.

Do not leak a source-scope-changing template-controller condition into child-view scope. A state-backed `if.bind` condition can type-check through the state source scope, but ordinary child bindings still see the original child view unless they also use `& state`.

Template completions and weak-member diagnostics must use the resource's runtime-analysis expression world before asking RuntimeBindingSourceExpressionContextProjector for cursor source scope; a fresh expression world loses app/runtime facts such as configured state stores and i18n binding-behavior lifecycle.

If completions work before diagnostics but lose `type-shape-detail` afterward, inspect expression-cache product lifetime first. Diagnostics can cache expression evaluations whose answer-local TypeShape products are then disposed; CheckerExpressionTypeEvaluator should invalidate stale cache entries instead of completion code tolerating missing details.

Definition-level expression parses can have several runtime instruction-scope applications. Overlay generation should spend `bindingScopesForTemplateExpressionParse(...)` and emit probes for each unique materialized BindingScope; singular scope lookup is intentionally unambiguous-only so consumers do not silently choose the first recursive render-context row.

Statement-shaped surfaces such as DestructuringAssignment need statement/block overlay emission or a lower shared primitive when they are actually parser-admitted. The current semantic parser carries repeat destructuring through BindingPattern projection; use the expression coverage script before turning a support-matrix frontier row into implementation work.
CustomExpression should route through owner-specific products, currently i18n TranslationBinding, before generic overlay unsupported-syntax handling changes.

From-view, two-way, checked/select/class/style, getter-only computed targets, nullish writeback, and other direction-sensitive channels must be checked against binding data-flow and observer products, not only generated TypeScript assignability.

Runtime-assignment overlay locals should consume the scope-materialized source-local type. The target bindable member may supply an indexed-access expression only when the source-local type still equals the target member type; value-converter `fromView` results and other converted writeback locals should emit their own stable type expression or remain explicit pressure.

Overlay diagnostics should map checker rows back through exact generated segments and suppress or join rows already owned by semantic diagnostics on the same authored span. Missing-member rows suppress TS2339/TS2551, and binding data-flow source-assignment rows suppress assignment-shaped TS2322/TS2588 so semantic-runtime product diagnostics keep the actionable repair target. Cursor diagnostics must project binding-assignment rows before overlay rows so cursor-time answers spend the same agreement policy as file/app diagnostics.

Repeat overlay prelude projection should preserve weak app types: `any` may stay `any`, but `unknown` repeat sources should produce unknown locals and public TS18046 diagnostics instead of silently degrading to `any`.

Keep repeat unknown slot preservation shared below overlays: TypeChecker iterator projection should use the common checker-union helper and materialize unknown locals so semantic cursor diagnostics expose no-members rather than missing-slot-type.

Generated overlay context-slot locals should spend materialized BindingScope target types when present and degrade to `unknown` when absent; `contract:type-system-overlays` checks generated overlay text for accidental `undefined as any` holes across current canaries.

Keep synthetic Array.flat/flatMap repeat locals on the shared iterated-type hydration substrate. A compact checker related reference from an inner array must be hydrated before scope construction, otherwise cursor diagnostics regress to missing-slot-type even though the checker can prove the element type.
Future rename/edit work must join overlay source segments with TypeScript references and Aurelia semantic references; overlay provenance alone is not a complete edit reachability model.

This frontier is nextActionPolicy=when-touched after common app-builder-facing overlay, binding-flow, observer, value-channel, component-object-boundary, computed/getter, and runtime-effect contracts stayed green. Keep it as integration grounding while app-builder discovers concrete generated-code patterns; do not let pixel-perfect rare expression narrowing or abstract overlay completeness block authoring/app-builder work.
If Work Router misses overlay/typechecking/diagnostic/provenance phrases, improve the template-overlay-integration route before continuing product work.

anchors.summary: Generated TypeScript overlay builder that replays materialized semantic scopes.
One-overlay mutable build state for generated source, expression probes, skipped rows, base projection context, and runtime source-expression projectors.
Overlay build phase that replays every parsed template expression through materialized scopes before generated TypeScript is finalized.
Shared BindingScope ancestry replay and `$this`/`$parent` alias reachability policy for overlay, cursor, diagnostic, and future edit surfaces.
Shared source-scope evaluation predicate for ancestor scopes and same-level synthetic scopes that replayed source facts.
Shared source-scope relation for generated analyses that can wrap copied expressions in deeper replay layers.
Same-level synthetic-scope replay predicate that requires source creators and visible slots, not only a common parent scope.
Expression AST support and ownership matrix for overlay projection.
Expression projector for source copying, owner-lowered calls, generated-child splicing, and unsupported owner/frontier rows.
Overlay layer/block emission boundary for generated checker surfaces, including parent alias capture/replay across generated blocks.
Plural expression-to-runtime-scope selector used by overlays when one instruction has several materialized scope applications.
Scoped runtime binding selector used before overlays copy binding source expressions under a materialized BindingScope.
Offset-aware template expression parse to runtime source projection selector for cursor and diagnostic consumers.
Binding-owned source expression context projector consumed by overlays before copying runtime binding source expressions.
Program-owned overlay source and generated-source segment metadata.
Explicit overlay diagnostic lane that maps checker diagnostics back to authored source.
Binding/data-flow owner that guards overlay checker results against Aurelia binding direction and observer semantics.
Owner-specific lane for CustomExpression-backed i18n translation binding diagnostics.
Public source-reference envelope that future rename/edit plans must make exact enough.
The semantic-runtime.template-overlay-integration route should be the first routing surface for overlay integration pressure.
Atlas coverage probe for parser construction, support-matrix ownership, and overlay/evaluator consumer rows for expression AST kinds.
Focused contract for overlay source mapping, support matrix, generated-child splicing, diagnostics, and public overlay rows.
Focused contract for cursor completions through runtime binding source scopes without child-scope leakage.
Pressure fixture for `$this`, `$parent`, destructured locals, and nested scope alias replay.
Pressure fixture for value-converter lowering, direct toView overlay calls, dynamic withContext runtime branches, generated child splicing, and diagnostic source mapping.
Pressure fixture for overlay typing through parent-bound controller values.
Pressure fixture proving overlay source reads for `& state` without changing repeat child `$parent` ancestry.
Pressure fixture proving state-backed template-controller conditions do not leak store names into ordinary child bindings.
Pressure fixture for public overlay diagnostics and cursor diagnostic rows.
